results.rendered_html:
asmad pron. [as-madik  Uṇ. 1. 136 ] A pronominal base from which several cases of the 1st personal pronoun are derived; it is also abl. pl. of the word.
— m. The individual soul, the embodied soul; yūyaṃ vayaṃ vayaṃ yūyamityāsīnmatirāvayoḥ . kiṃ jātamadhunā yena yūyaṃ yūyaṃ vayaṃ vayaṃ ..  Bh. 3. 65  (quite estranged from each other).
Comp.
— druh a. Ved. forming a plot against us or me, inimical.
— vidha, -asmādṛśa a. similar or like us.
